---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Selected builds and experiments"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-shell}
<div class="section-heading">Project format</div>

::: {.content-card}
Each project entry can follow the same structure:

- Name
- Short summary
- Stack or tools used
- Status or outcome
:::

<div class="section-heading">Future entries</div>

::: {.content-card}
This page is ready for project notes, case studies, and screenshots once you start adding them.
:::
:::
